ops.title: 100x fleet docs: Great Docs redesign + rollout completion
ops.description: Approved plan at ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-05/plans/we-need-to-finishin-valiant-hopper.md. Redesign the centralized Great Docs template (sidebar→footer via gd-build patch, hero:{logo:false}, termshow demo, doctest rendering fix, type cross-links, search relevance, WCAG-fixing base CSS + per-repo accents), adopt native features (freeze+cache, SEO/social, xref, lint/proofread/linkcheck CI, versioning pilot, normalize cc-steer), build non-Python content-only mode, migrate cc-squash/cc-orchestrate/cc-review, retire orphaned captain-hook RTD, delete mintlify-docs (user-authorized). summ+ego out of scope. All changes land in cc-skills (tools/gd-build + plugin/guides/yml); propagation via daily guides crons only. Note: cc-task 3d99639 referenced by the centralization commit does not resolve in this repo's store — no recorded Phase C found.

ops.text: gd-build selftest green + captain-hook local build shows all 7 redesign items
user design gate passed on before/after screenshots
fleet fragments pushed; consumers re-render via daily cron (no manual sweep)
all in-scope sites screenshot-audited green; rollout recorded as cc-notes log
